title: Convert Enum.each-with-mutable-accumulator to Enum.filter
prompt: Refactor `MyApp.ListUtils.collect_evens/1` from test_fixtures/non_tail_recursive.ex. The function uses `Enum.each/2` with what looks like accumulator mutation — `acc = acc ++ [x]` — which is a no-op in Elixir (the outer `acc` is never updated). The function actually returns `[]` always. Rewrite as a single `Enum.filter/2` call that returns only the even elements. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.ListUtils do ... end` with just collect_evens.
tier_rationale: Must recognize the non-mutation bug and pick Enum.filter as the correct replacement.
